product_overview: CollegeIQ is a college discovery platform that helps students and parents browse engineering and higher-education colleges, compare options side by side, and build a shortlist. The app also supports college detail pages with reviews and questions, plus supporting content for courses, exams, and careers.
core_goals: Discover relevant colleges quickly through search and filters
Compare 2–4 colleges side by side on key metrics
Save colleges and comparisons for later review
Read and contribute reviews and questions on college detail pages
Browse supporting information about courses, exams, and careers

features.name: Browse Colleges
features.description: Users can search and filter engineering colleges, scroll through listings, and open a college detail page.
user_flows: Navigate to /colleges -> Type a college name or keyword into search -> Refine results using state, fees, or rating filters -> Scroll to load more colleges -> Open a college row to view its detail page
Navigate to /colleges -> Apply a quick rating or fee filter -> Review the updated college list -> Scroll for more results

features.name: College Detail
features.description: Users can view detailed information about a specific college, including overview data, courses, placements, reviews, and discussion threads.
user_flows: Navigate to /colleges/[slug] -> View college name, location, fees, and rating -> Review overview information -> Switch between courses, placements, reviews, and Q&A sections -> Read existing reviews and questions
Navigate to /colleges/[slug] -> Open the reviews section -> Write a rating and comment -> Submit the review -> See the new review appear
Navigate to /colleges/[slug] -> Open the Q&A section -> Enter a question title and body -> Submit the question -> See the question thread appear

features.name: Compare Colleges
features.description: Users can search for colleges, add up to four colleges to a comparison table, and view differences in fees, ratings, and placements.
user_flows: Navigate to /compare -> Search for colleges -> Add two or more colleges to the comparison set -> View the side-by-side comparison table -> Remove any college to adjust the set
Navigate to /compare -> Search for colleges -> Add up to four colleges to the comparison set -> Review the comparison metrics for location, fees, rating, and placements

features.name: Saved Colleges
features.description: Signed-in users can view their saved shortlist, open college details from saved items, and remove colleges from the list.
user_flows: Navigate to /saved -> View the saved colleges list -> Open a saved college to see its detail page -> Return to the saved list -> Remove a college from the shortlist
Navigate to /saved -> View the saved colleges list -> Remove a college from the shortlist -> See the list update without the removed college

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can sign in or register through a modal, use a demo account, and continue gated actions after authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the sign-in flow from the header -> Switch between login and register options -> Enter email and password -> Submit the form -> See the authenticated experience
Navigate to / -> Open the sign-in flow from the header -> Choose the demo account option -> See the authenticated experience immediately
Navigate to / -> Open the sign-in flow from the header -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the form -> See an authentication error message

features.name: Courses Listing
features.description: Users can browse and search courses, then open related college information from a course entry.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses -> Browse the paginated course list -> Search for a course by name -> Open a course entry -> View the linked college information

features.name: Static Exams Content
features.description: Users can browse static entrance exam content and open detailed exam pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /exams -> Browse exam cards -> Open an exam card -> View the exam detail page

features.name: Static Careers Content
features.description: Users can browse static career path content and open detailed career pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /careers -> Browse career cards -> Open a career card -> View the career detail page

routes.description: Public landing page with hero, features, and navigation
Authenticated welcome dashboard with quick actions
Explore colleges with filters in app shell layout
Colleges listing with search, filters, and infinite scroll
College detail page with reviews and discussions
Compare up to 4 colleges side-by-side; save requires login
Overview dashboard with stats and quick links
Courses listing fetched from backend API

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and register via modal; demo login available in header
user_interactions: Click Sign In or Login button in header
Switch between Login and Register tabs in modal
Fill email and password fields
Click Login or Create Account to submit
Click Try Demo Account for one-click demo login
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Browse Colleges
features.description: Search and filter engineering colleges with pagination
user_interactions: Type in search bar to filter colleges
Click state, fees, or rating filter chips
Scroll to load more colleges
Click a college row to open detail page
Click bookmark icon to save college (prompts login if unauthenticated)

features.name: College Detail
features.description: View college info, placement stats, reviews, and Q&A
user_interactions: View college name, location, fees, and rating
Read existing reviews and discussion questions
Submit a review with rating and comment (login required)
Ask a question about the college (login required)

features.name: Compare Colleges
features.description: Select colleges and compare fees, ratings, and placement side-by-side
user_interactions: Search for colleges to add to comparison
Click college cards to add up to 4 colleges
View comparison table with metrics
Remove colleges from comparison
Enter name and save comparison (login required)
View and delete saved comparisons (login required)

features.name: Saved Colleges
user_interactions: View list of saved colleges when logged in
See login prompt when not authenticated
Remove college from saved list
Navigate to college detail from saved card

features.name: Courses Listing
features.description: Browse courses across colleges from backend API
user_interactions: View paginated list of courses
Search courses by name
Click course to see linked college

features.name: Static Content Pages
features.description: Exams and careers pages use local static data, not backend API
user_interactions: Browse exam or career cards
Click card to view detail page

known_limitations.issue: Exams and careers pages use static local data, not connected to backend API
known_limitations.impact: Content is hardcoded and cannot be updated via API

known_limitations.issue: Backend API runs on port 3000; frontend dev server on port 3001
known_limitations.impact: Frontend requires backend running at NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL for live data features
